nasb.text: The sons of Shobal were Alian, Manahath, Ebal, Shephi and Onam. And the sons of Zibeon were Aiah and Anah.

esv.text: The sons of Shobal: Alvan, Manahath, Ebal, Shepho, and Onam. The sons of Zibeon: Aiah and Anah.

cnv.text: 朔巴的兒子是亞勒、瑪拿轄、以巴錄、示非和阿南。祭便的兒子是亞雅和亞拿。

ccb.text: 朔巴的儿子是亚勒文、玛拿辖、以巴录、示非、阿南。祭便的儿子是亚雅、亚拿。
